title: AX's QOL pack
description: A modpack created to share my vision of the perfect Minecraft experience here on Modrinth.
body:
[![Discord Profile](https://qc4r02304d.ufs.sh/f/8SsGIHuNAvth2ktF8KntaAfeig9EqwzGNXx8RBLF03KYQV4J)](https://discordapp.com/users/809849001318678588) **<-- DM me for support/questions** [![Ko-fi](https://qc4r02304d.ufs.sh/f/8SsGIHuNAvthkN6K3uM1EcYojlOvW3zN47fGAU6MZ8eb2m5P)](https://ko-fi.com/sonoax) **<-- Tips/Update Posts** ![Pack Banner (Made in mine-imator by yours truly)](https://qc4r02304d.ufs.sh/f/8SsGIHuNAvthN9C2RNTp3fuwy7gQ4ZrxMmOqdajniAzHWvhP) # About AX's QOL PACK is a lightweight Minecraft modpack created to share **my vision** of the perfect Minecraft experience here on Modrinth. This pack combines some mods that enhance performance and improve quality of life (QOL) in the game, to give you a **smoother** and more **enjoyable** experience **without compromising stability or compatibility**. _By using AX'S QOL pack, you agree to the [following disclaimers](https://axqol.sonoax.site/disclamers)._ --- # Features ## Performance, Performance, Performance!!! AX's QOL PACK includes modern performance mods like **Sodium**, **Lithium**, and many others, that I have handpicked to optimize your game and reduce lag and stutter on many devices. ## Quality of Life Improvements From custom menus and better animations to useful utilities and UI tweaks, this pack adds lots of QOL features that make Minecraft more enjoyable without changing the core gameplay. ## Compatibility and Flexibility Built on **Fabric**, AX's QOL PACK supports a lot of mods and resource packs. It works well with vanilla servers and can be customized by adding your favorite mods on top. --- # FAQ > **Q: How do I install or update the modpack?** > > A: Just download the version you prefer in the .mrpack file format or install it easily with the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app)! > To update the pack, you can either re-download it from this page or simply update it through the built-in “Update Modpack” function in the Modrinth app. > > **Q: I have a suggestion for something you could change. How can I share it?** > > A: Reach out to me on Discord **@SonoAX**, I’d love to hear your ideas. > > **Q: Does this modpack require server-side mods?** > > A: No, AX's QOL PACK works perfectly on any vanilla server. However, please be aware that future updates of some mods included in the pack may alter game behavior in ways that certain server anti-cheat systems could flag as suspicious. **I am NOT responsible for any bans or penalties that may result from using this modpack on servers with strict anti-cheat measures**. Always check server rules and permissions before playing with mods. > > **Q: Can I add my own mods to this pack?** > > A: Absolutely! Since it’s built on Fabric, you can easily add mods you like to further customize your experience. > > **Q: Where can I get support? I’ve more questions to ask!** > > A: Just hit me up on Discord **@SonoAX** . > --- # Credits:
